Class EntitySpawner

java.lang.Object
ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.EntitySpawner
public class EntitySpawner extends Object
Manages the spawning and configuration of all entities (Zombies, Coins, Traps, Food) based on the currently selected game difficulty.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    EntitySpawner(GamePanel gp)
    Constructs an EntitySpawner and initializes it with a reference to the GamePanel.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    getzombieSpawnIndex()
    Gets the current index for the next zombie spawn point.
    boolean
    isTileWalkable(int tileRow, int tileCol)
    Checks if a specific tile location on the map is walkable (not a collision tile).
    void
    setDifficulty(Difficulty difficulty)
    Sets the current game difficulty for the spawner.
    void
    setzombieSpawnIndex(int a)
    Sets the index for the next zombie spawn point.
    void
    spawnAll(Difficulty difficulty)
    Clears all existing entities and spawns new ones (Zombies, Traps, Coins, Food) according to the specified difficulty's configuration.
    void
    spawnZombie(double speed)
    Spawns a single zombie at the next designated spawn point based on the current difficulty.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • EntitySpawner

      public EntitySpawner(GamePanel gp)
      Constructs an EntitySpawner and initializes it with a reference to the GamePanel.
      Parameters:
      gp - The GamePanel instance, used to access game state and dimensions.

  • Method Details

    • isTileWalkable

      public boolean isTileWalkable(int tileRow, int tileCol)
      Checks if a specific tile location on the map is walkable (not a collision tile).
      Parameters:
      tileRow - The row index of the tile.
      tileCol - The column index of the tile.
      Returns:
      true if the tile is within bounds and does not block movement, false otherwise.

    • setDifficulty

      public void setDifficulty(Difficulty difficulty)
      Sets the current game difficulty for the spawner.
      Parameters:
      difficulty - The desired difficulty level (EASY, MEDIUM, or HARD).

    • setzombieSpawnIndex

      public void setzombieSpawnIndex(int a)
      Sets the index for the next zombie spawn point.
      Parameters:
      a - The new index value.

    • getzombieSpawnIndex

      public int getzombieSpawnIndex()
      Gets the current index for the next zombie spawn point.
      Returns:
      The current zombie spawn index.

    • spawnAll

      public void spawnAll(Difficulty difficulty)
      Clears all existing entities and spawns new ones (Zombies, Traps, Coins, Food) according to the specified difficulty's configuration.
      Parameters:
      difficulty - The difficulty level to use for spawning configuration.

    • spawnZombie

      public void spawnZombie(double speed)
      Spawns a single zombie at the next designated spawn point based on the current difficulty.
      Parameters:
      speed - The movement speed to assign to the new zombie.
